faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Briarwood homes?
faqs.answer: Briarwood residents most frequently encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, and occasionally wolf spiders. During warmer months, garden spiders may also migrate indoors from nearby green spaces. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method for your situation.
